title: Bridge Essay: Metacontrol of human creativity: The neurocognitive mechanisms of convergent and

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Metacontrol, of, human, creativity:, The.

**Metacontrol of human creativity: The neurocognitive mechanisms of convergent and divergent thinking.** — Neuroimage. PMID: 31972282. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2020.116572. Creativity is acomplex construct that would benefit from amore comprehensive mechanistic approach. Two processes have been defined to be central to creative cognition: divergent and convergent thinking. These two processes are most often studied using the Alternate Uses Test (heavily relying on divergent thinking), and the Remote Associates Test (heavily relying on convergent thinking, at least with analytical solutions).
